# Chapter One

This EPUB fixture exercises the first bounded direct-entry lane on simple
chapter-first prose with one short list and no fabricated page model.

- Ada keeps the research log.
- Lin checks the archive notes.

# Chapter Two

The second chapter confirms that chapter grouping resumes correctly after the
list and that pageless provenance can still point back to stable source element
ids in the final `doc-web` bundle.
